title: The Missing Lindbergh Baby

segments.text: In 1932, Charles Lindbergh's baby was kidnapped from their home.
A ransom was demanded, and the case captured national attention.
Despite the ransom paid, the baby was never returned.
A conviction was eventually made, but the body was never found.
The case is often viewed as a cautionary tale of crime.
A haunting mystery that still resonates today.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: In 1932, the Lindbergh baby was kidnapped, leading to ongoing mysteries. Follow for daily cold cases! 🍼
